overview: A two-component architecture: a Go backend REST API handling authentication, task and category management with per-user data isolation, and a React SPA frontend that consumes the API over HTTPS/JSON. The frontend communicates with the backend via authenticated JWT-based HTTP requests.
requirements: Email/password registration with verification email and bcrypt hashing
Login creates 24h session; auto-logout on inactivity
Password reset via emailed secure link
Authenticated CRUD on tasks (title ≤200, description ≤2000) scoped to owner
One category per task; custom categories (name ≤50) CRUD; deleting unassigns
Optional due dates; chronological sort with undated last; highlight due today and overdue
Filter by category, completion status (all/active/completed), date range (today/week/month/overdue); search by text
Responsive UI with dashboard counts and <2s visual confirmation on CRUD
Retain user input on network errors and show error messages
List retrieval <500ms for up to 1000 tasks; concurrent-safe persistence with daily backup
HTTPS, input sanitization, redirect unauthenticated users, 100 req/min rate limit, lockout after 5 failures in 15min for 30min

components.name: todo-api
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
  /auth/register:
    post:
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties: {email: {type: string}, password: {type: string}}
      responses:
        '201': {description: Created}
  /auth/login:
    post:
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties: {email: {type: string}, password: {type: string}}
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
  /auth/logout:
    post:
      responses:
        '204': {description: No Content}
  /auth/password-reset:
    post:
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties: {email: {type: string}}
      responses:
        '202': {description: Accepted}
  /account:
    put:
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
  /tasks:
    get:
      parameters:
        - {name: category, in: query, schema: {type: string}}
        - {name: status, in: query, schema: {type: string}}
        - {name: dateRange, in: query, schema: {type: string}}
        - {name: q, in: query, schema: {type: string}}
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
    post:
      responses:
        '201': {description: Created}
  /tasks/{id}:
    get:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
    put:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
    delete:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '204': {description: No Content}
  /tasks/{id}/complete:
    post:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
  /categories:
    get:
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
    post:
      responses:
        '201': {description: Created}
  /categories/{id}:
    put:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
    delete:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '204': {description: No Content}
components.componentAgentInstructions: Build a Go backend using net/http on port 9090. Implement JWT-based session authentication (24h expiry) with bcrypt password hashing. Endpoints for auth (register, login, logout, password-reset, update account), tasks (CRUD, mark complete, filter by category/status/dateRange/search), and categories (CRUD, deleting removes assignment from tasks). Enforce per-user data isolation. Validate inputs (title ≤200 chars, description ≤2000, category ≤50). Rate limit 100 req/min/user. Lock account after 5 failed logins in 15 min for 30 min. Use in-memory store with mutexes for concurrency (or SQLite if simple). CORS enabled. Return JSON. /health returns 200 OK. Tasks have id, userId, title, description, categoryId, dueDate, completed, completedAt, createdAt.

components.name: todo-web
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo Web
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
components.componentAgentInstructions: Build a React + TypeScript SPA served via nginx. Pages: Login, Register, Password Reset, Dashboard (task list with counts by category/status), Task Edit, Categories, Account Settings. Responsive layout (desktop+mobile). Features: create/edit/delete tasks, assign category, set due date/time, mark complete/incomplete, filter by category/status/date range (today/week/month/overdue), search by title/description, sort chronologically with undated last. Highlight due-today and overdue tasks visually. Show completion timestamps. Preserve filter/sort across navigation (localStorage or URL params). Show toast confirmations within 2s for CRUD; on network errors display message and retain user input. Redirect unauthenticated users to login. Call todo-api via configured base URL. Expose /health (nginx config).
